title: RiskDecision
description: RiskEngine output for an OrderIntent. Every OrderIntent must receive exactly one RiskDecision.

timestamp_ns.description: Decision timestamp in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.

order_id.description: Reference to the OrderIntent being evaluated.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable reason code (e.g. MAX_POSITION, MAX_DAILY_LOSS, STALE_DATA).

original_quantity.description: Original requested quantity. Null if not applicable.

approved_quantity.description: Approved quantity after risk adjustment. Null if order is rejected.

approved_price.description: Approved price after risk adjustment. Null if not adjusted.

max_allowed_position.description: Maximum position allowed by risk rules at this moment.

current_position.description: Current position at time of decision.

daily_pnl.description: Current daily PnL at time of decision.

risk_rule_triggered.description: Name of the specific risk rule that triggered the decision. Null if ALLOW.

kill_switch_active.description: True if kill switch was active at time of decision.
